sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75509" key="o)/rwra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄρωρα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρώρει</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρώρεται</orth>, <sense id="n75509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὄρνυμι, ὄρομαι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
